alternative_parents.description: Compounds containing a diphenylmethane moiety, which consists of a methane wherein two hydrogen atoms are replaced by two phenyl groups.
alternative_parents.name: Diphenylmethanes

alternative_parents.description: Aromatic compounds containing a ketone substituted by one aryl group, and a phenyl group.
alternative_parents.name: Aryl-phenylketones

alternative_parents.description: Organic Compounds containing a benzene ring which bears at least one carboxyl group.
alternative_parents.name: Benzoic acids

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds containing a carboxamido substituent attached to a benzene ring.
alternative_parents.name: Benzamides

alternative_parents.description: Organosilicon compounds with the general formula RO[Si](R')(OR'')OR''' (R-R''' = aliphatic organyl group).
alternative_parents.name: Trialkoxysilanes

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds containing an acyl moiety of benzoic acid with the formula (C6H5CO-).
alternative_parents.name: Benzoyl derivatives

alternative_parents.description: Aromatic compounds containing 1 carboxyl group and a C-X (X = halogen) group at adjacent positions of an aromatic ring.
alternative_parents.name: 1-carboxy-2-haloaromatic compounds

alternative_parents.description: Fatty acids with a chain that contains at least one CC double bond.
alternative_parents.name: Unsaturated fatty acids

alternative_parents.description: Compounds containing a fatty acid moiety linked to an amine group through an ester linkage.
alternative_parents.name: N-acyl amines

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds containing exactly two carboxylic acid groups.
alternative_parents.name: Dicarboxylic acids and derivatives

alternative_parents.description: Alpha,beta-unsaturated ketones that carry a branch on the alpha carbon. They have the generic structure RC(=O)C(R')=C, R = organyl group and R'= any heteroatom.
alternative_parents.name: Alpha-branched alpha,beta-unsaturated ketones

alternative_parents.description: Compounds containing the enone functional group, with the structure RC(=O)CR'.
alternative_parents.name: Enones

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds containing the acryloyl functional group (which has the core fragment but-3-en-2-one).
alternative_parents.name: Acryloyl compounds

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds containing a silicon atom covalently bonded to an alkoxy group. They have the general formula R1R2R3Si-O-R4 (R4 = aryl, alkyl).
alternative_parents.name: Silyl ethers

alternative_parents.description: Organosilicon compounds where the tetravalent silicon atom is linked to one or more heteroatoms.
alternative_parents.name: Organoheterosilanes

alternative_parents.description: Organic salt compounds containing a metalloid atom in its ionic form.
alternative_parents.name: Organic metalloid salts

alternative_parents.description: Carboxylic acid derivatives containing a carbonyl group in which the carbon atom is linked to a nitrogen atom (substituted or not). The general formula of the carboxylic acid amide is R1C(=O)N(R2)R3 (R1,R2,R3=H, alkyl, aryl).
alternative_parents.name: Carboxylic acid amides

alternative_parents.description: Compounds containing a bond between carbon a pnictogen atom. Pnictogens are p-block element atoms that are in the group 15 of the periodic table.
alternative_parents.name: Organopnictogen compounds

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds containing a nitrogen atom.
alternative_parents.name: Organonitrogen compounds

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds containing an oxide group.
alternative_parents.name: Organic oxides

alternative_parents.description: Derivatives of hydrocarbons obtained by substituting one or more carbon atoms by an heteroatom. They contain at least one carbon atom and heteroatom.
alternative_parents.name: Hydrocarbon derivatives

class.description: Aromatic compounds containing one monocyclic ring system consisting of benzene.
class.name: Benzene and substituted derivatives

description: This compound belongs to the class of organic compounds known as benzophenones. These are organic compounds containing a ketone attached to two phenyl groups.

direct_parent.description: Organic compounds containing a ketone attached to two phenyl groups.
direct_parent.name: Benzophenones

kingdom.description: Compounds that contain at least one carbon atom, excluding isocyanide/cyanide and their non-hydrocarbyl derivatives, thiophosgene, carbon diselenide, carbon monosulfide, carbon disulfide, carbon subsulfide, carbon monoxide, carbon dioxide, Carbon suboxide, and dicarbon monoxide.
kingdom.name: Organic compounds

subclass.description: Organic compounds containing a ketone attached to two phenyl groups.
subclass.name: Benzophenones

superclass.description: Aromatic compounds containing one or more benzene rings.
superclass.name: Benzenoids
